guardrail: static projection of the public register; no facts added here

data.name: CN -> TW (CNY->NTD directed edge)
data.feasibility_class: Category III (no direct issuance; partnership / coordination route)

infrastructure_overlap.note: CN on mBridge; TW on no shared wholesale-settlement experiment. At least one end off the shared experiments.

inbound_mechanism.test: Virtual Asset Service Act enacted 2026-06-30, not yet commenced; inbound gate not reached because the origin has no exportable authorizable token (Category III via origin drag)

class_basis.instrument: Eight-ministry Notice 银发〔2026〕42号, in force on publication 2026-02-06 (repealing 银发〔2021〕237号): no unapproved offshore issuance of renminbi-pegged stablecoins; extraterritorial bar on PRC entities and their controlled offshore affiliates issuing virtual currencies abroad; restriction on onshore real-world-asset tokenization. Paired with CSRC 公告〔2026〕1号.

record_ref_meta.note: Vocabulary divergence only: the register's binding_status enum carries `prohibition` as a first-class value; the curated signal writes `in_force_enacted` of the prohibiting instrument (银发〔2026〕42号, in force 2026-02-06). Same instrument, same fact, two encodings.
record_ref_meta.divergence: Vocabulary divergence only: the register's binding_status enum carries `prohibition` as a first-class value; the curated signal writes `in_force_enacted` of the prohibiting instrument (银发〔2026〕42号, in force 2026-02-06). Same instrument, same fact, two encodings.

origin_override.basis: Mainland capital-flow controls (SAFE) and the cross-border data framework (PIPL, DSL, CAC).
